payload.query: mutation($id: String!, $name: String!, $description: String!, $cutoffDate: DateTime!, $vat: Boolean!, $transparentInvoicing: Boolean!) { updateCharge(input: { id: $id, name: $name, description: $description, cutoffDate: $cutoffDate, vat: $vat, transparentInvoicing: $transparentInvoicing }) { boolean } }
